docs.text: Packer image reports ¶ Reports here are for Windows images built using Hasicorp Packer for Windows Server and Windows 10 images for Windows Virtual Desktop, Citrix Cloud etc., in Azure. Images are built via Azure DevOps and stored in a Shared Image Library . Leverages Evergreen to create images with the latest application versions so that each image is always up to date. Reports are created in markdown format for basic tracking of image updates. Operating System Status Windows 10 Enterprise Windows 10 multi-session Windows Server 2019
